reason: Captured the executable v1 contract for same-conversation side dispatch: lane fields, per-agent slot rules, prompt snapshot rehydration, stop/delete guardrails, SSE events, and required regressions.
Documented that chat composer, stop/delete affordances, and live message stages must merge main-turn and side-slot runtime/SSE state.
Documented controller-side lane passthrough and the delete guard requirements for active or queued side-slot work.
Updated the task PRD from research-only framing to the final v1 implementation closeout and checked acceptance criteria.
